details.failingMessage: Safe validation capture was attempted on this host, but the stored Shopify conformance access token is invalid and refresh failed: This request requires an active refresh_token.

notes: Planned invoice-send parity and side-effect-safety scenario. Shopify sends an email for this root, so local runtime support intentionally does not send an invoice upstream or email a customer; it returns the staged draft plus an explicit local userError until a no-recipient/safe live fixture can settle exact behavior.
